caption: A man wearing a pink sleeveless shirt and black shorts is playing basketball in an indoor gymnasium featuring blue padded walls, blue tiered bleachers, and a wooden court with a dark blue center section. In the first frame, he is running across the court, dribbling a basketball toward a hoop. In the second frame, he has leaped high into the air and is dunking the ball into the hoop. In the third frame, he is positioned on the court, crouching low and holding the basketball with both hands. Finally, in the fourth frame, he is jumping vertically with his arm extended upward, though the ball is seen floating high above the hoop in the background. The environment remains constant throughout the sequence, with the basketball hoop, court markings, and gym architecture staying in place as the man performs different athletic movements.
